prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约173→252→203，近三年波动较大，2024年明显后移（位次数字增大），2025年有所回升；2025年基准约203名。；理科计划2023–2025年均为22人，2026年计划19人，较2025年缩招约13.6%，缩招通常使竞争略有缓解、位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第6名（Top6），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（食堂管理、宿舍政策等舆情），但整 体关注度中等；抖音热度排名第17（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；历史投档异常信号为2022年中关注（专业组分差），未见明显断档；拥有 A+学科11个（中国语言文学、化学、地理学、地质学、外国语言文学、大气科学、天文学、工商管理、物理学、环境科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），A/A-学科十余个，学科实 力顶尖，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续高位；本省2025年理科考生约5.25万人，2026年总考生约2 3.8万人（无分科数据，按近年理科占比约68.6%估算约16.3万人），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；南京大学位于江 苏南京，属东部发达地区，对西部省份考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在新疆理科招生人数占比较小（约22人），属典型跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合缩招（位次前移约17名） 与本省考生总数大幅增长（竞争加剧）两股相反力量，考生增幅远超缩招幅度，竞争加剧效应占主导；同时学校层次顶尖、抖音高热持续吸引高分考生。预计2026年理科最低位次 约196名，区间146–246名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 173 → 252 → 203, showing significant fluctuations in recent three years, with a notable backward shift in 2024 (increase in ranking number) and a recovery in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 203rd. The science enrollment plan was 22 students each year from 2023 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 19 students, a reduction of about 13.6% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment usually eases competition slightly and moves the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 6th (Top 6) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, placing it among the top universities in the country, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to public opinion on cafeteria management, dormitory policies, etc.), but overall attention is moderate; Douyin popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), with significant short video exposure, reflecting relatively high application attention. Historical admission anomaly signal was moderate attention in 2022 (major group score difference), with no obvious gaps. It has 11 A+ disciplines (Chinese Language and Literature, Chemistry, Geography, Geology, Foreign Languages and Literature, Atmospheric Science, Astronomy, Business Administration, Physics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and more than ten A/A- disciplines, with top-tier academic strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat. In 2025, the number of science candidates in the province was about 52,500; in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (no subject-specific data, estimated at about 163,000 based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%), with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, with strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from western provinces. The university's enrollment of science students in Xinjiang is relatively small (about 22 students), typical of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the two opposing forces of enrollment reduction (ranking moving forward by about 17 places) and a significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensified competition), the increase in candidates far outweighs the reduction in enrollment, with the competition intensification effect dominating. At the same time, the top-tier university level and high Douyin heat continue to attract high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 196th, with a range of 146 to 246.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (146–246), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 146), you can focus on top majors like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 246), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 options such as Engineering Experimental Class or Earth Sciences as a safe choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 minimum liberal arts rankings approximately 115→103→120, stable overall between 100–120 in recent three years, slightly forward in 2024, rebounded in 2025; 2025 baseline about 120. Liberal arts plan: 9 in 2023–2024, increased to 10 in 2025, 13 in 2026, a 30% expansion from 2025, which typically eases competition and shifts rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 6th (Top6), top national university level, highly attractive to high-scoring liberal arts students; 2026 reputation slightly negative (cafeteria management, dormitory policies, etc.), but overall attention moderate; Douyin popularity ranking 17th (high heat), short video exposure large, reflecting high application interest; historical abnormal admission signal in 2022 medium attention (major score gap), no obvious gap; liberal arts related A+ disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Business Administration; A disciplines include Philosophy, Law, Sociology, Theoretical Economics, etc., liberal arts strength top nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature and other liberal arts majors socially hot, teacher/education differentiation wait-and-see; 2025 provincial liberal arts candidates about 24,000, 2026 total candidates about 238,000 (estimated about 74,700 liberal arts based on recent 31.4% share), candidate scale significantly increased, competition intensifies; Nanjing University located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, strong cross-provincial appeal to western province liberal arts candidates; its liberal arts enrollment in Xinjiang small (about 10), typical cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combined 30% expansion (ranking shift backward about 22 places) and significant increase in provincial candidate numbers (intensified competition), both forces point to ranking backward; while top university level continues to attract high-scoring candidates. Estimated 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking about 150, range 100–200.
